mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_room_members (chat_room_id, user_id, joined_at) VALUES (#{chatRoomId}, #{userId}, #{joinedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, chat_room_id, user_id, last_read_message_id, last_read_at, joined_at, left_at FROM chat_room_members WHERE chat_room_id = #{chatRoomId} AND left_at IS NULL
